memories.content: Deployed auth service hotfix to production. Rollout completed without errors.
Auth team completed token-refresh endpoint. Added retry logic on 503 responses.
Priya and Jordan paired on the auth session-store migration. They resolved the Redis key-expiry edge case together and agreed on the TTL strategy going forward.
eventstore batch-write endpoint merged and deployed to staging.
auth service load test passed at 500 RPS with p99 under 80ms.
auth integration test suite refactored to use pytest fixtures.
Decided to use HMAC-SHA256 for auth token signing instead of RSA to reduce latency.
Decided to use Elasticsearch for the eventstore read path to support full-text queries.
Reversed the Elasticsearch decision for eventstore. Switching to Postgres FTS instead - Elasticsearch ops overhead is too high for our current team size.
Decided to pause the search rollout because we are blocked on the vendor contract renewal. Will revisit once legal clears the new terms.
Decided billing module will use idempotency keys on all Stripe webhook handlers.
Blocked on the vendor contract for search rollout - legal review has not started yet.
Legal cleared the vendor contract. Search rollout blocker is resolved.
Blocked on billing: Stripe sandbox credentials are expired, waiting on ops to rotate them.
eventstore schema migration blocked on DBA sign-off for the new partitioning strategy.
auth OAuth2 scope review is blocked on security team availability.
Blocked on warehouse data pipeline: upstream vendor delayed the API spec by two weeks.
Write unit tests for the auth token refresh endpoint.
Review and merge billing webhook handler PR before end of sprint.
Follow up with ops to rotate the Stripe sandbox credentials.
Migrate warehouse pipeline to the new vendor API format. Still open - vendor spec not received.
Sam (Engineering Manager) and Dana (Product Lead) meeting on Friday to align on the Q3 roadmap priorities. Dana wants to push auth and billing milestones forward.
Sam flagged that the auth latency work should be demo-ready before the Q3 kickoff. Dana will present it to stakeholders.
Sam and Dana reviewed the billing roadmap; agreed to defer payment-plan changes to Q4.
Warehouse data pipeline initial design completed. Architecture diagram shared with team.
Decided to use Apache Parquet for warehouse storage format to enable downstream analytics.
